en.extract:
The white-bellied munia (Lonchura leucogastra) is a species of estrildid finch. It is found in Malesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical/ tropical lowland moist forest habitat, and it is also found in grasslands and residential areas. The status of the species is evaluated as Least Concern. It is an invasive species. 


Diet
It is a granivore, consuming 2-2.8 grams of rice per day. It sometimes forages in mixed-species flocks with white-headed munias and Javan munias.


References

BirdLife Species Factsheet

The '''white-bellied munia''' ('''''Lonchura leucogastra''''') is a species of [[estrildid finch]]. It is found in [[Malesia]]. Its natural habitat is subtropical/ tropical lowland moist forest habitat, and it is also found in grasslands and residential areas.<ref>{{Cite journal |date=2012-05-01 |title=Lonchura punctulata: BirdLife International |website=IUCN Red List of Threatened Species|doi=10.2305/iucn.uk.2012-1.rlts.t22719821a38430639.en }}</ref> The status of the species is evaluated as [[Least Concern]]. It is an invasive species.<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=YAP |first1=Charlotte A. M. |last2=SODHI |first2=Navjot S. |date=2004 |title=Southeast Asian invasive birds: ecology, impact and management |journal=Ornithological Science |volume=3 |issue=1 |pages=57–67 |doi=10.2326/osj.3.57 |issn=1347-0558|doi-access=free }}</ref> 

== Diet ==
It is a granivore, consuming 2-2.8 grams of rice per day.<ref>Priyambodo S and Ziyadah K 2011 Pros. Semin. Ilm. Has. Penelit. Padi Nas. p 171</ref> It sometimes forages in mixed-species flocks with [[White-headed munia|white-headed munias]] and [[Javan munia|Javan munias]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Sridhar |first1=Hari |last2=Beauchamp |first2=Guy |last3=Shanker |first3=Kartik |date=August 2009 |title=Why do birds participate in mixed-species foraging flocks? A large-scale synthesis |journal=Animal Behaviour |volume=78 |issue=2 |pages=337–347 |doi=10.1016/j.anbehav.2009.05.008 |issn=0003-3472}}</ref>

zh.extract:
白胸文鸟（学名：Lonchura leucogastra），是梅花雀科文鸟属的一种，分布于文莱、缅甸、泰国、印度尼西亚、菲律宾和马来西亚。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
白胸文鸟的平均体重约为11.4克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林、乡村花园、亚热带或热带的（低地）湿润疏灌丛和耕地。


参考文献
Lonchura leucogastra. BirdLife.org.   [2011-06-27]. （原始内容存档于2016-03-04）.
